abilities.name: Death's Reach
abilities.text: This model may draw range and LoS for its attack actions from any Remains marker within 8".

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: Decay
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (r)1" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain an Injured token.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (/) action targeting the same model.

actions.name: Vile Reclamation
actions.effects: Another ally within range heals 2, +1 for each raise this action receives.

triggers.name: Dismember
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Command Corpse
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a Remains marker. Select an action printed on an ally within 3" of the target.
actions.effects: This model declares the selected action, drawing range and LoS from the target. Then, remove the target.
